'''bowayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballoid|caballoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballoid|caballoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bowayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bowayithi|bowayithi]] || [[word:bowayiji|bowayiji]] || [[word:bowayishi|bowayishi]] || [[word:bowayiki|bowayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bowayuthuthu|bowayuthuthu]] || [[word:bowayujuju|bowayujuju]] || [[word:bowayushushu|bowayushushu]] || [[word:bowayukuku|bowayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bowayuthu|bowayuthu]] || [[word:bowayuju|bowayuju]] || [[word:bowayushu|bowayushu]] || [[word:bowayuku|bowayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bowayufthuf|bowayufthuf]] || [[word:bowayufjuf|bowayufjuf]] || [[word:bowayufshuf|bowayufshuf]] || [[word:bowayufkuf|bowayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bowayethe|bowayethe]] || [[word:bowayeje|bowayeje]] || [[word:bowayeshe|bowayeshe]] || [[word:bowayeke|bowayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bowayothotho|bowayothotho]] || [[word:bowayojojo|bowayojojo]] || [[word:bowayoshosho|bowayoshosho]] || [[word:bowayokoko|bowayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bowayotho|bowayotho]] || [[word:bowayojo|bowayojo]] || [[word:bowayosho|bowayosho]] || [[word:bowayoko|bowayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bowayofthof|bowayofthof]] || [[word:bowayofjof|bowayofjof]] || [[word:bowayofshof|bowayofshof]] || [[word:bowayofkof|bowayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:boway챦fth챦f|boway챦fth챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fj챦f|boway챦fj챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fsh챦f|boway챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fk챦f|boway챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:boway챦fth챦fth챦f|boway챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fj챦fj챦f|boway챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fsh챦fsh챦f|boway챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fk챦fk챦f|boway챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:boway챦fth챦f|boway챦fth챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fj챦f|boway챦fj챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fsh챦f|boway챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fk챦f|boway챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:boway챦fth챦f|boway챦fth챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fj챦f|boway챦fj챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fsh챦f|boway챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:boway챦fk챦f|boway챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:boway챈th챈|boway챈th챈]] || [[word:boway챈j챈|boway챈j챈]] || [[word:boway챈sh챈|boway챈sh챈]] || [[word:boway챈k챈|boway챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bowayathatha|bowayathatha]] || [[word:bowayajaja|bowayajaja]] || [[word:bowayashasha|bowayashasha]] || [[word:bowayakaka|bowayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bowayatha|bowayatha]] || [[word:bowayaja|bowayaja]] || [[word:bowayasha|bowayasha]] || [[word:bowayaka|bowayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bowayafthaf|bowayafthaf]] || [[word:bowayafjaf|bowayafjaf]] || [[word:bowayafshaf|bowayafshaf]] || [[word:bowayafkaf|bowayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bowayasha|bowayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bowaysh챘sha|bowaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bowayrosha|bowayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bowaymusha|bowaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bowayasha|bowayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobowaynksh챘sha|gobowaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobowaynkrosha|gobowaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobowaynkmusha|gobowaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobowaynkyasha|gobowaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bowawayasha|bowawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bowawaysh챘sha|bowawaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bowawayrosha|bowawayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bowawaymusha|bowawaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bowawayasha|bowawayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobowawaynksh챘sha|gobowawaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobowawaynkrosha|gobowawaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobowawaynkmusha|gobowawaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobowawaynkyasha|gobowawaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bew챈yasha|bew챈yasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bew챈ysh챘sha|bew챈ysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bew챈yrosha|bew챈yrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bew챈ymusha|bew챈ymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bew챈yasha|bew챈yasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobew챈ynksh챘sha|gobew챈ynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobew챈ynkrosha|gobew챈ynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobew챈ynkmusha|gobew챈ynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobew챈ynkyasha|gobew챈ynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bowfayasha|bowfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bowfaysh챘sha|bowfaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bowfayrosha|bowfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bowfaymusha|bowfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bowfayasha|bowfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobowfaynksh챘sha|gobowfaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobowfaynkrosha|gobowfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobowfaynkmusha|gobowfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobowfaynkyasha|gobowfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
